title: Heatwave 16x
description: A Sick and Fire-themed 1.21 PvP Texturepack
body:
### Credits
**Super big thanks to [Torrezx](https://www.planetminecraft.com/member/torrezx/) since the netherite tools in this texturepack are massively inspired by the ones in his [Demon Fire Tools](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/torrezx-demond-fire) texturepack so huge credits to him, go check out his work because he's genuinely amazing**

-----------------------------------------------------------------------
Heatwave is a modern version Minecraft PvP texturepack that brings fire to the default game items.

This texturepack brings a fiery look to:
- Diamond Armor, Tools and Sword
- Netherite Armor, Tools and Sword
- Elytra, Enderpearls, Gapples, Exp Bottles, Wind Charges, Enchant Glint
- GUI and HUD
- Bow, Crossbow, Totem of Undying and Mace
- End Crystals and Respawn Anchors

_Keep in mind that further updates will add more stuff so keep an eye out 👀_


Other than the warm and pleasing look, this texturepack brings competitive adavantages too, such as the smaller items that cover up less of your screen.
